title: 5 Tips to Become a Gantt Chart Expert Using monday.com from the Stiltsoft Team

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We’ve just published a new blog post: 5 Tips to Become a Gantt Chart Expert Using monday.com.

It covers practical tips for building clearer and more reliable Gantt charts - from using Timeline columns instead of single dates and milestones to tracking changes with baselines and automations. We also touch on ways to review and discuss timelines with clients and stakeholders, keeping feedback structured and easy to follow.

Hope you find it useful! Feel free to share your own Gantt tips or questions in the comments

5 Tips to Become a Gantt Chart Expert in monday1200×750 131 KB
